meta.title: Who's to Say ? Foundation | Coming Soon
meta.description: Who's to Say ? Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit creating creative, community-centered programs and a future live/work residence for neurodiverse young adults. Full site coming soon.

hero.title: Who's to Say ? Foundation
hero.subhead: Creativity without comparison. Building possibility paths for young adults with diverse abilities.
hero.subheadHtml:
Creativity without comparison.
Building possibility paths for young adults with diverse abilities.
hero.note: More updates coming soon. For partnerships, reach us via the Contact link in the header.

autismMonth.title: Every Mind Is a World
autismMonth.body:
April is Autism Acceptance Month — a time to celebrate neurodiversity, embrace different ways of thinking, and champion inclusion for all.

At the Who's to Say? Foundation, we believe every person brings something extraordinary to the table. Acceptance isn't just a word — it's how we show up, every single day.
autismMonth.bodyHtml:
